mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HEALTH_RECORDS ( RECORD_ID, USER_ID, HEIGHT, WEIGHT, BMI, FASTING_GLUCOSE, POSTPRANDIAL_GLUCOSE, RANDOM_GLUCOSE, HBA1C, SYSTOLIC_BP, DIASTOLIC_BP, DIABETES_TYPE, DIAGNOSED_DATE, IS_PREGNANT, HAS_DIABETES_FAMILY, IS_INSULIN_TAKEN, SMOKING, ALCOHOL, EXERCISE_FREQ, DIET_TYPE, TEST_SOURCE, DEL_FLAG, RECORDED_AT ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{userId}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{bmi}, #{fastingGlucose}, #{postprandialGlucose}, #{randomGlucose}, #{hba1c}, #{systolicBp}, #{diastolicBp}, #{diabetesType}, #{diagnosedDate}, #{isPregnant}, #{hasDiabetesFamily}, #{isInsulinTaken}, #{smoking}, #{alcohol}, #{exerciseFreq}, #{dietType}, #{testSource}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT RECORD_ID AS recordId, USER_ID AS userId, HEIGHT AS height, WEIGHT AS weight, BMI AS bmi, FASTING_GLUCOSE AS fastingGlucose, POSTPRANDIAL_GLUCOSE AS postprandialGlucose, SYSTOLIC_BP AS systolicBp, DIASTOLIC_BP AS diastolicBp, RECORDED_AT AS recordedAt FROM HEALTH_RECORDS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY RECORDED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT RECORD_ID AS recordId, USER_ID AS userId, HEIGHT AS height, WEIGHT AS weight, BMI AS bmi, FASTING_GLUCOSE AS fastingGlucose, POSTPRANDIAL_GLUCOSE AS postprandialGlucose, RANDOM_GLUCOSE AS randomGlucose, HBA1C AS hba1c, SYSTOLIC_BP AS systolicBp, DIASTOLIC_BP AS diastolicBp, DIABETES_TYPE AS diabetesType, DIAGNOSED_DATE AS diagnosedDate, IS_PREGNANT AS isPregnant, HAS_DIABETES_FAMILY AS hasDiabetesFamily, IS_INSULIN_TAKEN AS isInsulinTaken, SMOKING AS smoking, ALCOHOL AS alcohol, EXERCISE_FREQ AS exerciseFreq, DIET_TYPE AS dietType, TEST_SOURCE AS testSource, RECORDED_AT AS recordedAt FROM HEALTH_RECORDS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY RECORDED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HEALTH_RECORD_MEDICAL_HISTORIES ( HISTORY_ID, RECORD_ID, USER_ID, DISEASE_CODE, DISEASE_NAME, DIAGNOSED_DATE, STATUS, NOTE, SOURCE, DEL_FLAG, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{recordId}, #{userId}, #{diseaseCode}, #{diseaseName}, #{diagnosedDate}, #{status}, #{note}, #{source}, 0, NOW() )

INSERT INTO HEALTH_RECORD_MEDICATIONS ( MEDICATION_ID, RECORD_ID, USER_ID, DRUG_NAME, GENERIC_NAME, DOSAGE, FREQUENCY, FREQUENCY_DESC, ROUTE, PURPOSE, IS_INSULIN, START_DATE, END_DATE, STATUS, SOURCE, DEL_FLAG, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{medicationId}, #{recordId}, #{userId}, #{drugName}, #{genericName}, #{dosage}, #{frequency}, #{frequencyDesc}, #{route}, #{purpose}, #{isInsulin}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{source}, 0, NOW() )

INSERT INTO HEALTH_RECORD_FAMILY_HISTORIES ( FAMILY_HISTORY_ID, RECORD_ID, USER_ID, RELATION, MEMBER_AGE, IS_ALIVE, DISEASE_CODE, DISEASE_NAME, DIAGNOSED_AGE, IS_DIABETES, NOTE, SOURCE, DEL_FLAG, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{familyHistoryId}, #{recordId}, #{userId}, #{relation}, #{memberAge}, #{isAlive}, #{diseaseCode}, #{diseaseName}, #{diagnosedAge}, #{isDiabetes}, #{note}, #{source}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT HISTORY_ID AS historyId, RECORD_ID AS recordId, USER_ID AS userId, DISEASE_CODE AS diseaseCode, DISEASE_NAME AS diseaseName, DIAGNOSED_DATE AS diagnosedDate, STATUS AS status, NOTE AS note FROM HEALTH_RECORD_MEDICAL_HISTORIES WHERE RECORD_ID = #{recordId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY CREATED_AT

SELECT MEDICATION_ID AS medicationId, RECORD_ID AS recordId, USER_ID AS userId, DRUG_NAME AS drugName, GENERIC_NAME AS genericName, DOSAGE AS dosage, FREQUENCY AS frequency, FREQUENCY_DESC AS frequencyDesc, ROUTE AS route, PURPOSE AS purpose, IS_INSULIN AS isInsulin, START_DATE AS startDate, END_DATE AS endDate, STATUS AS status FROM HEALTH_RECORD_MEDICATIONS WHERE RECORD_ID = #{recordId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY CREATED_AT

SELECT FAMILY_HISTORY_ID AS familyHistoryId, RECORD_ID AS recordId, USER_ID AS userId, RELATION AS relation, MEMBER_AGE AS memberAge, IS_ALIVE AS isAlive, DISEASE_CODE AS diseaseCode, DISEASE_NAME AS diseaseName, DIAGNOSED_AGE AS diagnosedAge, IS_DIABETES AS isDiabetes, NOTE AS note FROM HEALTH_RECORD_FAMILY_HISTORIES WHERE RECORD_ID = #{recordId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY CREATED_AT
